name: Lead Qualification Agent (Form Submissions)

parameters.formDescription: Provide your details below, and we'll be in touch!

values.fieldLabel: What can we help you with?

nodes.name: On form submission
nodes.notes: ENTRY POINT — This is the public-facing form leads fill out. It collects Name, Company website, Email, and their request. Once you activate the workflow, copy the 'Test URL' or 'Production URL' from this node and share it with leads or embed it on your site. No setup needed.

nodes.name: HTTP Request
nodes.notes:
Sends the lead's company website URL to Relevance AI, which scrapes and researches the company. The URL below is pre-configured — only change it if you are using a different Relevance AI agent.
IMPORTANT: Always use the v1 endpoint, NOT v2.
URL: https://app.relevanceai.com/form/d7b62b/2024dcc2-fbb4-4260-92b3-edfce443909f?version=latest&primaryColor=%23000000

nodes.name: Ollama Chat Model
nodes.notes:
SETUP REQUIRED — Connect your Ollama credential here.
1. Go to Settings > Credentials > Add > Ollama.
2. Set Base URL to: http://localhost:11434 (or your Ollama server address).
3. Ensure the model is available: run 'ollama pull deepseek-v3.1:671b-cloud' in your terminal.

parameters.subject: Thanks for your intrust
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('On form submission').item.json.Name }},

Thanks for your interest in Big Boy Recruitment services! AS we specialze in recruitment for software businesses such as SaaS and development agencies, we're not a good fit for you based on your company's industry.

Please let me know if you'd like us to connect you with one of our partners who specialzies in dealing with your needs.

Cheers,

Virus
Head of Sales, Big Boy Recruits (BBR)
Dallas, TX

nodes.name: Send a message in Gmail
nodes.notes:
SETUP REQUIRED — Sends a rejection email to leads who do not qualify.
1. Connect your Gmail OAuth2 credential.
2. The recipient email is taken automatically from the form submission — no change needed.
3. Optionally update the email body to match your branding.

parameters.description:
If the lead is qualified to work with Big Boy Recruits (e.g., they operate a software-based business such as SaaS companies or development agencies), then trigger this tool and send the lead data in the following format.

company_information is clear, concise, and structured, summarizing key details such as industry, services/products, target market, and any notable context (2–4 lines maximum)
 (The data in this is dummy, and you should replace it with the correct data):
{
  "name": "Full name of the lead",
  "email": "Lead's email address",
  "message": "Brief description of their requirement or request",
  "qualified": true,
  "company_information": "Short structured summary: Industry | Services/Products | Target Market | Key Notes"
}

value.Qualified: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('Qualified', `If the lead is qualified based on our criteria, set it to true; else, set it to false`, 'boolean') }}
value.Name: ={{ $('On form submission').item.json.Name }}
value.Message: ={{ $('On form submission').item.json['What can we help you with?'] }}
value.Company info: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('Company_info', `A short summary of the company details and the industry in which they are`, 'string') }}

nodes.name: Call 'Qualified Lead Classifier AND Notifier'
nodes.notes:
SETUP REQUIRED — Links this workflow to the sub-workflow.
1. Import 'Qualified Lead Classifier AND Notifier' first.
2. Open this node and set the Workflow field to your imported sub-workflow (search by name or paste the Workflow ID from its URL).
3. The input fields (Name, Email, Message, Company info, Qualified) are mapped automatically.

nodes.name: AI Agent
nodes.notes: Core qualification agent. Analyzes the form submission and Relevance AI company research, then decides if the lead qualifies. If qualified → calls the 'Qualified Lead Classifier AND Notifier' sub-workflow. If not → uses the Gmail tool to send a rejection email. No setup needed here.

description:
MAIN WORKFLOW — Import and activate this AFTER importing and activating 'Qualified Lead Classifier AND Notifier'.

SETUP STEPS:
1. In the 'HTTP Request' node: the URL is already set to the Relevance AI company researcher. If you are using a different Relevance AI agent, update the URL. Use the v1 endpoint, NOT v2.
   URL: https://app.relevanceai.com/form/d7b62b/2024dcc2-fbb4-4260-92b3-edfce443909f?version=latest&primaryColor=%23000000
2. In the 'Ollama Chat Model' node: connect your Ollama credential (base URL: http://localhost:11434). Ensure the deepseek-v3.1:671b-cloud model is running.
3. In the 'Send a message in Gmail' tool node: connect your Gmail OAuth2 credential (used to send rejection emails to unqualified leads).
4. In the 'Call Qualified Lead Classifier AND Notifier' tool node: set the Workflow ID to match the ID of your imported sub-workflow.
5. Activate this workflow. Copy the Form Trigger URL from the 'On form submission' node and share it or embed it on your website.
